articles.title: TRUMP'S CRYPTO DINNERS IN RAISE POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST
articles.summary: President Trump announced a “Crypto & AI Innovation Dinner” hosted by MAGA Inc., following a previously planned gala for top $TRUMP memecoin holders. The events coincided with a 50% surge in $TRUMP trading and revelations that Trump Organization insiders control 80% of the token's supply, earning $325 million in fees since January. Trump denied any personal profit, framing crypto as a counter to China and downplaying the token's price. Legal experts are split, with some raising ethical concerns and others deeming the events legally permissible.

articles.title: BITCOIN COMMUNITY SPLIT OVER OP_RETURN LIMIT REMOVAL PLAN FROM CORE DEVS
articles.summary: Bitcoin Core developers have proposed removing the 80-byte size cap on OP_RETURN outputs, calling the restriction outdated and frequently bypassed in less secure ways. The proposal has drawn criticism from those concerned about a lack of community consensus and the risk of increased blockchain spam.

articles.title: ACROSS PRIME
articles.summary: Across Protocol has launched Across Prime, a new cross-chain bridge model that enables users to send funds directly to relayers without locking them in escrow. This bonded design improves capital and gas efficiency by using reusable security deposits and eliminating separate claim transactions.

articles.title: INTRODUCING X402
articles.summary: Coinbase has introduced x402, an open-source payments protocol that activates the dormant HTTP 402 “Payment Required” status code. It enables on-chain payments through standard web infrastructure, allowing developers to monetize APIs and content via microtransactions without relying on subscriptions or complex billing systems.

articles.title: AI TRENDS IN THE TRENCHES
articles.summary: The AI agent sector is booming, driven by Virtuals' “Genesis Launch” model that blends point-based incentives with fixed supply to generate short-term returns and boost valuations. While favoring hype and trading over core product development, this dynamic creates an opening for DeFi protocols to offer real yield strategies. Revenue-sharing models, where trading fees fund creator treasuries and buybacks, are gaining traction. Still, Virtuals' dominance may wane as alternative launchpads and decentralized AI infrastructure platforms emerge.

articles.title: BITCOIN CORE DEBATE
articles.summary: A debate is unfolding within the Bitcoin Core community regarding a proposal to lift limits on OP_RETURN, a transaction feature that stores data. Critics warn of potential blockchain spam and abuse, while proponents argue it's a necessary update to accommodate legitimate data use more securely.

articles.title: STEPPING DOWN AS A UNISWAP DELEGATE
articles.summary: Pepo, a respected Uniswap DAO contributor, is stepping down as a delegate. After consistently offering critical feedback and challenging governance narratives, he expressed frustration that his independence was penalized as the Foundation began prioritizing loyalty over transparency. He argues that Uniswap governance has become performative, validating pre-determined outcomes rather than encouraging meaningful debate.

articles.title: WHY PECTRA MATTERS
articles.summary: Pectra, Ethereum's next major upgrade, will focus on user experience, bringing smarter wallets, cheaper transactions, and streamlined staking. Unlike previous protocol-focused improvements, Pectra makes Ethereum more intuitive and efficient for everyday users, signaling a shift toward mainstream usability.

articles.title: $DOOD TO LAUNCH ON SOLANA
articles.summary: Doodles is launching its new token, $DOOD, on Solana, with airdrops for current Doodles NFT holders and members of its New Blood community.

articles.title: IF I REVOKE MY STAKING APPROVAL - WILL I LOSE MY STAKED TOKENS?
articles.summary: Revoking a staking approval does not impact a user's staked tokens or halt reward accrual.

articles.title: UK TREASURY'S ECONOMIC SECRETARY EMMA REYNOLDS RULES OUT NATIONAL #BITCOIN RESERVE
articles.summary: Emma Reynolds, the UK Treasury's Economic Secretary, has ruled out establishing a national Bitcoin reserve, stating it would not be suitable for the UK market.

articles.title: COINBASE PARTNERS WITH RIOT GAMES FOR ESPORTS
articles.summary: Coinbase has entered a multi-year deal with Riot Games to serve as the exclusive crypto exchange and official blockchain technology partner for global League of Legends and VALORANT esports events.
